quote: The most important thing in communication is to hear what isn't being said. – Peter Drucker
fact: In space, astronauts cannot cry, because there is no gravity, so the tears can't flow.
joke: I remember when I was a kid, I opened my fridge and noticed one of my vegetables were crying. I guess I have some emotional cabbage.
